name: RENOMEDULLARY INTERSTITIAL CELL TUMOR
definition: MEDULLARY FIBROMA rare benign often incidental mesenchymal neoplasm of kidney

demographics.Histo: stellate spindle cells on basophilic stroma

dominant_finding: hypointense on T1WI + T2WI (← rich collagen content)
discriminating_features: small nonenhancing noncalcified hypoattenuating solid mass
hypointense on T1WI + T2WI (← rich collagen content)

general: small nonenhancing noncalcified hypoattenuating solid mass
hypointense on T1WI + T2WI (← rich collagen content)
